meaning: n.盒子,箱,包厢,岗亭,一拳v.装...入盒中,打耳光,拳击
examples: The inside of the box was blue.
Come and help me lift this box.
Can you reach me down that box?
They want the individual chosen by the ballot box, not an accident of birth.
The military procurement bureaucracy apparently cannot come up with a set top decoding box quickly enough.
